title: The Impossible Game
body:
Another useless Minecraft mod:

# The Impossible Game
This mod really makes Minecraft impossible (trust me) doing those things:

- You can't place blocks
- You can't break blocks
- You can't interact with blocks
- You can't interact with items
- Entities can't take damage
- YOU can't take damage

I bet you can't beat Minecraft with this mod! If you do, **please send the video to our Discord**!
